scripts.compose: rover supergraph compose --config supergraph.yaml --output supergraph-schema.graphql --elv2-license accept
scripts.start:subgraphs: concurrently --names "home-maintenance,recipes,project-mgr" "pnpm -C ../gql-home-maintenance run start:dev" "pnpm -C ../gql-recipes run start:dev" "pnpm -C ../gql-project-mgr run start:dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "pnpm run start:subgraphs" "wait-on tcp:4001 tcp:4002 tcp:4003 && pnpm run compose && pnpm run start:router"
